projects.name: G05 - GG Dashboard
projects.description: GG Dashboard — 一個 central dashboard 俾 Terrence 睇晒所有 system status（cron健康、提醒、tunnel、disk、error registry）、屬靈功課、TODO、快速action buttons
projects.notes: Built prototype — combines G05 + G02 (Exam Center link) + G03 (Voice Practice link). Geckoboard-style dark card dashboard. Mobile-first, status cards, schedule, alerts, projects, quick actions.
